title: Over ₹5.63 crore penalty imposed on periodicals, 88,315 publications cancelled: I&B Ministry
content:
The I&B Ministry has imposed penalties totaling over ₹5.63 crore on various periodicals.
*   A substantial number of 88,315 publications have been cancelled as part of these actions.
*   These measures have been taken by the Ministry of Information and Broadcasting.

title: AP govt. moving towards AI-driven approach to governance, says Lokesh
content:
The Andhra Pradesh (AP) government is adopting an AI-driven approach.
*   This AI integration will specifically target improving governance.
*   The announcement regarding this initiative was made by Lokesh.

title: J&K govt. ‘drags feet’ on relieving water sports expert Bilquis Mir to train national team for Asian Games
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The J&K government is reportedly delaying the release of water sports expert Bilquis Mir.
*   Mir is required to train the national water sports team.
*   This delay impacts the national team's crucial preparation for the upcoming Asian Games.

title: Madhya Pradesh govt directs Collectors to review LPG supply arrangements, prevent black marketing
content:
The Madhya Pradesh government has directed District Collectors to review LPG supply arrangements.
*   Collectors are tasked with ensuring the smooth and efficient distribution of LPG.
*   A primary objective is to prevent and curb the black marketing of LPG.

title: SRMIST signs MoU with Naval Academy to collaborate in technical education and research
content:
SRMIST has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the Naval Academy.
*   The agreement establishes a partnership between the two institutions.
*   The collaboration will focus on technical education and research initiatives.

title: Sports Minister Mansukh Mandaviya leads push for F1 revival in India, meets FMSCI officials
content:
Sports Minister Mansukh Mandaviya is actively leading efforts to bring Formula 1 racing back to India.
*   He held meetings with officials from the Federation of Motor Sports Clubs of India (FMSCI) to discuss the revival.
*   This initiative signals a significant push by the government to reinstate top-tier motorsport in the country.

title: House panel pulls up line ministries for ‘slow, tardy’ progress in execution of flagship schemes for tribal villages
content:
Here's the summary of the headline in 3 bullet points:

*   A House panel has criticized various line ministries.
*   The criticism is for their "slow and tardy" progress in project execution.
*   Specifically, this relates to flagship schemes intended for tribal villages.

title: Reliance remains mum even as Trump announces ‘historic’ $300 billion U.S. refinery deal
content:
Trump has announced a "historic" $300 billion deal for a U.S. refinery.
*   Despite this major development, Reliance has remained silent on the announcement.
*   The headline highlights Reliance's notable lack of comment even as such a significant, industry-relevant agreement was revealed.

title: Consumers flock to LPG agencies as bookings fail
content:
LPG booking systems are failing, preventing consumers from securing gas through normal channels.
*   As a result, consumers are flocking to physical LPG agencies in large numbers.
*   This indicates a significant disruption in the supply and distribution of cooking gas.

title: Minister, Chief Secretary chair meet to review LPG shortage
content:
A high-level meeting was chaired by a Minister and the Chief Secretary.
*   The primary agenda of the meeting was to review the prevailing LPG shortage.
*   Discussions focused on examining the situation and likely strategizing solutions for the scarcity.
